indication: Niraparib in combination with abiraterone acetate (Akeega) and predniSONE/prednisoLONE for the treatment of adults with metastatic castration resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) and BRCA1/2 mutations (germline and/or somatic) in whom chemotherapy is not clinically indicated.
description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved niraparib in combination with abiraterone acetate and prednisolone for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of adults with metastatic castration resistant prostate cancer (mCRPC) and BRCA1/2 mutations (germline and/or somatic) in whom chemotherapy is not clinically indicated.
raw_therapeutics: Niraparib and Abiraterone acetate and prednisoLONE

document.name: Niraparib and Abiraterone acetate (Akeega) and prednisoLONE Therapy. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
